svg.title: Traditional RAG architecture
svg.desc: Two-column flowchart: ingestion pipeline on the left and query pipeline on the right, both connected through a shared FAISS vector store via a cross-pipeline retrieval arrow.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types does the RAG data loader support?')
sendPrompt('How does the LangChain document loader work in this RAG system?')
sendPrompt('Explain the RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter chunking strategy used here.')
sendPrompt('Explain how the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model works.')
sendPrompt('How is the FAISS IndexFlatL2 vector store built and persisted?')
sendPrompt('What kind of queries can I ask this RAG system?')
sendPrompt('Why does the query use the same embedding model as the documents?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS vector search find the most relevant document chunks?')
sendPrompt('How is the retrieved context assembled before being sent to the LLM?')
g.text: top-5 chunks joined as prompt context

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Llama 4 Scout model used via Groq in this RAG system.')
sendPrompt('What does the final generated answer look like in this RAG system?')
